title: Annotation shadow-comparator E2E omits the SST source header and is rejected 400 before the comparator runs
source: current-session revert-reverify on a disposable stack (RED live 400 on load-bearing-line removal -> GREEN live 201 + api shadow-comparator counter advance)

createdViaParent.expansionReason: Active runtime exposes no runSubagent/agent tool; bugfix-fastlane is not a top-level-runtime-required mode, so bubbles.workflow (dispatched by bubbles.iterate) executes each phase owner's contract inline. implement is the committed 8ac848e1 fix (+6/-0 in tests/e2e/assistant/annotation_classifier_e2e_test.go); test/regression were RE-VERIFIED live this session with genuine revert-reverify evidence (RED live HTTP 400 'X-Smackerel-Source header required' when the load-bearing header line is removed, GREEN live HTTP 201 + api shadow-comparator counter advance, full assistant package 32 PASS); simplify/stabilize are bounded direct reviews; security/validate/audit carry prior operator-attested specialist provenance plus this session's guard-backed reconciliation.

executionHistory.summary: Root-cause fix committed in 8ac848e1 (+6/-0 in tests/e2e/assistant/annotation_classifier_e2e_test.go): TestAnnotationClassifierWithShadowComparator now reads the required header name from the generated SST env ANNOTATIONS_SOURCE_HEADER_NAME (fail-loud t.Fatal when empty) and sets that header to 'api' on the live annotation POST so the request satisfies internal/api/annotation_source.go and reaches the SCOPE-4b shadow comparator. Test-only change; no production handler, policy, schema, deployment, release-train, or secret surface touched (smackerel SST no-defaults respected; the header name is generated from config/smackerel.yaml annotations.source_header_name via required_value, no fallback added).

Current-session live revert-reverify on a disposable stack (good-neighbor; no foreign stack evicted). RED: temporarily removed the load-bearing annReq.Header.Set(sourceHeader, 'api') line -> focused e2e FAILs with the exact live 'POST annotation status = 400, body={"error":"X-Smackerel-Source header required"}' (RED_E2E_EXIT=1), reproducing the bug. Restored byte-exact via git checkout HEAD; working tree clean. GREEN: isolated focused e2e -> --- PASS: TestAnnotationClassifierWithShadowComparator, PASS: go-e2e, exit 0 (live 201 + api shadow counter advance). Targeted API unit adversaries GREEN: TestCreateAnnotation_MissingSourceHeader_400, TestCreateAnnotation_UnknownSourceHeader_400, TestCreateAnnotation_T9_07_RecordsWebChannelAndActor (UNIT_EXIT=0). Evidence in report.md.

Full assistant e2e package (./smackerel.sh test e2e --go-package assistant): TestAnnotationClassifierWithShadowComparator PASS (13.67s cold-facade) with the target 201 + api counter-advance contract, plus every neighboring assistant flow GREEN = 32 PASS / 13 SKIP (LLM-nondeterminism + telegram-webhook-mode). The only 2 failures are the SAME pre-existing unrelated build-environment failure (TestIntentReplayE2E_* in intent_replay_test.go -> replay CLI go build fails with 'error obtaining VCS status: exit status 128 / Use -buildvcs=false') in a different subsystem, outside this change boundary, not caused by this change (working tree packet-only), owned by concurrent spec069/intent-replay work (G051 class; DI-076-002-01). No product regression; no findings to route.

n/a with provenance. The fix reuses the existing live helpers already present in the same package (loadHTTPTurnLiveStack, waitHTTPTurnHealthy, waitAssistantFacadeReady, scrape076ShadowCallsTotal) and the standard os.Getenv read of the generated SST env var; it adds one fail-loud precondition (t.Fatal on empty header name) plus one Header.Set. No new type, abstraction, indirection, helper, or fallback introduced. Nothing to simplify.

n/a with provenance. Bounded stability review: test-only change; zero Docker/Compose/container-lifecycle/schema/NATS/migration/production changes; the disposable stack is torn down cleanly on exit (good-neighbor, confirmed in RED + isolated-GREEN teardown output — all containers Removed, volumes Removed); deterministic and collision-free (unique capture marker via time.Now().UTC().Format). No shared-fixture coupling introduced.
